checkpoint: ED2K link and file identity alignment
reference_scope: aMule ED2KLink; eMule ED2KLink; protocol-docs link grammar
target_behavior: Align file, server, serverlist, nodeslist, optional search-link handling, MD4 root hash, part hashes, AICH root, inline sources, source user hash, source crypt options, UTF-8 names, percent encoding, safe output names, and predictable malformed-link rejection.
notes: Search links can be supported or explicitly rejected, but behavior must be documented.

reference_scope: aMule/eMule server.met, nodes.dat, part.met, known.met, known2.met, clients.met; MLDonkey state
target_behavior: Align server.met and nodes.dat parsing. Replace legacy part.met, known.met, known2.met, and clients.met with aria2-next control files, session state, SharedStore, and UploadQueue ownership. Document hidden ED2K formats.
verification: Focused parser and session persistence checks
notes: Legacy database import is out of scope unless explicitly approved later.
